'''√r-ch-sh''' ('''karachash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrify|quadrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrify|quadrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karachash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirachash || jirachash || shirachash || kirachash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurachash || jujurachash || shushurachash || kukurachash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurachash || jurachash || shurachash || kurachash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurachash || jurachash || shurachash || kurachash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therachash || jerachash || sherachash || kerachash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorachash || jojorachash || shoshorachash || kokorachash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorachash || jorachash || shorachash || korachash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorachash || jorachash || shorachash || korachash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rachash || rachash || rachash || rachash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rachash || rachash || rachash || rachash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rachash || rachash || rachash || rachash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rachash || rachash || rachash || rachash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærachash || jærachash || shærachash || kærachash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharachash || jajarachash || shasharachash || kakarachash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharachash || jarachash || sharachash || karachash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharachash || jarachash || sharachash || karachash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharachash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharachash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharachash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharachashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharachashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharachashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharachashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharachashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharachashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharachashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharachashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharachashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharachashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharachashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharachashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharachashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharachashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharachashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharachashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharachashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharachashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharachashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharachashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharachashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharachashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharachashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharachashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharachashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharachashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharachashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharachashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharachashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharachashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharachashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharachashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharachashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharachashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharachashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharachashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharachashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharachashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharachashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharachashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharachashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharachashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharachashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharachashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharachashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharachashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharachashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharachashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharachashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharachashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
